```js title=./sub/fold.js
(self["rspackChunk"] = self["rspackChunk"] || []).push([["./sub/fold"], {
"./sub_fold.js"() {
console.log("123");


},

}]);
```

```js title=./sub/other.js
(self["rspackChunk"] = self["rspackChunk"] || []).push([["./sub/other"], {
"./other.js"() {
console.log("123");


},

}]);
```

```js title=./sub/single.js
(self["rspackChunk"] = self["rspackChunk"] || []).push([["./sub/single"], {
"./single_quote.js"() {
console.log("123");


},

}]);
```

```js title=./user/[id].js
(self["rspackChunk"] = self["rspackChunk"] || []).push([["./user/[id]"], {
"./user/1.js"() {
console.log("user [id]");


},

}]);
```

```js title=bug_only_single_quote_js.js
(self["rspackChunk"] = self["rspackChunk"] || []).push([["bug_only_single_quote_js"], {
"./bug_only_single_quote.js"() {
console.log("123");


},

}]);
```

```js title=main.js
(self["rspackChunk"] = self["rspackChunk"] || []).push([["main"], {
"./index.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __unused_rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.e(/* import() | normal */ "normal").then(__rspack_require.t.bind(__rspack_require, "./normal.js", 23));
__rspack_require.e(/* import() | with.dot */ "with.dot").then(__rspack_require.t.bind(__rspack_require, "./with_dot.js", 23));
__rspack_require.e(/* import() | ./sub/fold */ "./sub/fold").then(__rspack_require.t.bind(__rspack_require, "./sub_fold.js", 23));
__rspack_require.e(/* import() | ./sub/single */ "./sub/single").then(__rspack_require.t.bind(__rspack_require, "./single_quote.js", 23));

__rspack_require.e(/* import() | ./sub/other */ "./sub/other").then(__rspack_require.t.bind(__rspack_require, "./other.js", 23));
__rspack_require.e(/* import() | ./user/[id] */ "./user/[id]").then(__rspack_require.t.bind(__rspack_require, "./user/1.js", 23));
__rspack_require.e(/* import() | user/[id]/page */ "user/[id]/page").then(__rspack_require.t.bind(__rspack_require, "./user/page/2.js", 23));
__rspack_require.e(/* import() | user/(id)/page */ "user/(id)/page").then(__rspack_require.t.bind(__rspack_require, "./user/page/3.js", 23));

__rspack_require.e(/* import() */ "bug_only_single_quote_js").then(__rspack_require.t.bind(__rspack_require, "./bug_only_single_quote.js", 23));


},

},function(__rspack_require) {
var __rspack_exec = function(moduleId) { return __rspack_require(__rspack_require.s = moduleId) }
var __rspack_exports = (__rspack_exec("./index.js"));

}
]);
```

```js title=normal.js
(self["rspackChunk"] = self["rspackChunk"] || []).push([["normal"], {
"./normal.js"() {
console.log("123");


},

}]);
```

```js title=user/(id)/page.js
(self["rspackChunk"] = self["rspackChunk"] || []).push([["user/(id)/page"], {
"./user/page/3.js"() {
console.log("user (id)/page3");


},

}]);
```

```js title=user/[id]/page.js
(self["rspackChunk"] = self["rspackChunk"] || []).push([["user/[id]/page"], {
"./user/page/2.js"() {
console.log("user [id]/page2");


},

}]);
```

```js title=with.dot.js
(self["rspackChunk"] = self["rspackChunk"] || []).push([["with.dot"], {
"./with_dot.js"() {
console.log("123");


},

}]);
```
